resources.string: %1$s won\'t work unless you enable Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your phone.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are missing from your tablet.
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. If the problem persists, please contact the developer for assistance.
%1$s relies on Google Play services, which is not supported by your device. Contact the manufacturer for assistance.
%1$s won\'t run unless you update Google Play services.
%1$s won\'t run without Google Play services, which are currently updating.
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
If you enjoy playing this app, would you mind taking a moment to rate it? It won\'t take more than a minute. Thanks for your support!
Allow metrics management. If disabled, you can\'t add, edit, delete or rearrange metrics. This serves as protection from unintentional metrics changing.

Blink tile to draw attention, if the expression evaluates to 'true'.
Expression can be any valid JavaScript expression which evaluates to boolean (true|false).
You can use 'val' and 'secs' constants in your expression.
'val' contains either, received raw payload or extracted from JSON raw value, if JSON path specified.
'secs' contains numbers of seconds since last activity (last data received or image downloaded).
For example, with the following expression, tile will blink if temperature is lower than 10 or higher than 90: 'val < 10 || val > 90'.
Can\'t get image from the URL
With this metric you can display/set color values. For example, you can change colors of your LED strips.\nSupported formats for colors are: HEX or numeric string.
Show verbose connection-error dialog (blocks reconnect until dismissed)
Based on MQTT Dash by Routix Software

Default (automatically connect on start up).
Note: this option is useful if you have just one connection configured.
If you have more than one connection, you can create home screen shortcut for every connection.
To create shortcut long press on any connection in connections list.
Delete the broker? Are you sure?
Delete the metric? Are you sure?

If broker keeps retained messages for this metric, then a command will be sent to the broker in order to delete retained messages.\nNote: retained messages will be deleted from both topics, Sub and Pub, if specified in settings.\nSend delete command?
Display payload value instead of percentage
Download image from a static URL (MQTT not involved)
Download image from URL, received as payload contents
Empty value not allowed for this metric

Enable intermediate state (display spinning progress on top of the metric after publishing, while waiting for any incoming feedback message). Note: this does have sense only for different Pub/Sub topics.

Enable connection encryption (SSL/TLS).\nNote: if server certificate is self-signed, you need to install it to your device or enable option below, otherwise connection will fail. If server certificate issued by a known Certificate Authority (CA), it will work out of box, without installing to you device. Also don\'t forget, that MQTT servers have different ports for plain and SSL/TLS connections.
Image file data received as binary payload contents

This metric is intended for displaying image from a specified URL (static or received as payload). It\'s also possible to receive image file data as binary payload. E.g. you could display weather icon, which received as URL or binary data. Other usage could be displaying still image from your IP camera using static URL (for example, display garage door next to open/close metric switch, so you could monitor the door opening/closing).

Import / export metrics: you can subscribe for metrics on one device and publish metrics to the same topic on other device. Warning: Any existing metrics will be replaced! To prevent other clients to publish metrics data, use an unique secret topic name if needed
Intermediate state timeout in seconds (if after publishing no any incoming messages received during this time, remove spinning progress from the metric)
Extract from JSON path (if payload is in JSON format), e.g.: $.level.value. JSON path documentation at the URL below:
Keep screen on when connected to this broker
Long press option for additional actions
Metrics columns count for horizontal orientation (0 - auto)
Metrics columns count for vertical orientation (0 - auto)
This metric is intended for switching between multiple options (e.g. switching between air conditioning modes). Payload is expected to be string.
Never hide top panel with connection name
Your ratings and comments are the best donations for us! Please spend less than a minute of your precious time to rate the app.\nThank you!
Would you mind to rate the app?
\'On Display\' JavaScript handler called each time, when the app renders metric tile contents, e.g. when content changed or last activity time changed
\'On Receive\' JavaScript handler called when new payload received for this metric
\'On Tap\' JavaScript handler called when you tap (click) on the tile
Open this URL when image tapped

Payload and icons. If you need not a switch, but a simple button, just set the same payload values and the same icons for On and Off. This way the switch will never change icon and always send the same payload value.
New percentage must be in range [0..100]
This metric is intended for numeric progress/range displaying and changing (e.g. thermostat controlling, temperature displaying). Payload is expected to be string.
This metric is intended for state displaying and switching (e.g. light on/off). Or it can behave as a simple static button. Payload is expected to be string.
This metric is intended for displaying payload text (e.g. temperature displaying). Payload is expected to be string.
Topic (pub) - keep empty if the same as sub
This broker uses self-signed SSL/TLS certificate. I trust this certificate at my own risk.
Update metric on publish immediately (do not wait for incoming message to update visual state)
New value must be in range

You can\'t use the same sub and pub topics in conjunction with JSON path, because published payload will arrive back to the metric, but payload is expected to be in JSON format! Use different topics or don\'t use JSON path or disable publishing for this metric.
